properties.name: studio.features.wiki.persistence
properties.description: Wiki persistence implementation. Version 1 supports jpa only.

properties.name: studio.features.wiki.web.mgmt-base-path
properties.description: Management workspace API prefix used for wiki endpoints. The controller appends /{workspaceId}/wiki.

properties.name: studio.features.wiki.web.public-base-path
properties.description: Authenticated user workspace API prefix used for wiki endpoints. The controller appends /{workspaceId}/wiki.
